[[Tel Bollin]] was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] and only major [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Endregaad]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was built on a mesa, like all other settlements on Endregaad, to avoid the sandstorms that beset the valleys and canyons of that world. The closest other communities were a day's walk away. Tel Bollin had a [[Geode (rock)|geode]] [[Miners' Guildhall]], a [[Skydove Freight Warehouse|warehouse]] belonging to [[Skydove Freight]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] called the [[The Fallen Warrior]] and a [[Emergency Relief Area|disused sports ground]]. The city had a [[Tel Bollin City Hall|City Hall]], the center of all local administration, and apparently the highest level authority on the planet.<ref name="Tempest" />

[[Pre-Republic era]] ruins were near Tel Bollin, though they had not been studied.<ref name="Tempest" />
